title: sideritis theezans subsp. peloponnesiaca
intro: Sideritis theezans subsp. peloponnesiaca is a subspecies of the Sideritis genus, a type of flowering plant commonly known as Greek mountain tea. It is a perennial herb native to the Peloponnese region of Greece, known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and respiratory issues. Sideritis theezans subsp. peloponnesiaca can be consumed as a tea, either hot or cold, and is often used in herbal preparations, such as capsules and infusions, to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
